mcp-streamable-http.notes: OAuth no longer requires feature flag since 0.77.0.

mcp-resources.notes: Threadless resource reads since 0.123.0 — no active session required.

mcp-elicitation.notes: Server-driven elicitations since 0.119.0. Auto-approved in Full Access mode.

mcp-oauth.notes: Scopes configurable per-server in config.toml since 0.92.0.

notebook-edit.notes: No notebook/Jupyter support documented. Zero mentions in changelog or config reference.

background-monitor.notes: No background monitor tool. background_terminal_max_timeout config is subprocess I/O polling, not a user-facing monitor.

semantic-search.notes: No embedding-based semantic search documented. Zero mentions in changelog or config reference.

web-search.notes: Cached web search added in 0.79.0. Cached default in 0.92.0

web-fetch.notes: Web fetch capability via web search tool

image-generation.notes: Image generation saves to CWD. Enabled by default in 0.122.0

subagent-spawning.notes: Multi-agent collaboration with explorer role. Path-based addresses in 0.117.0

task-management.notes: No task/todo management tool documented. Zero mentions in changelog or config reference.

user-instructions.notes: ~/.codex/AGENTS.md for global personal instructions. Also AGENTS.override.md for overrides.

path-scoped-rules.notes: No path-scoped instruction rules. Codex 'rules' system is for command execution policy (allow/deny), not instruction scoping.

instruction-imports.notes: No import syntax. AGENTS.md files concatenate from git root to cwd automatically.

agents-md-compat.notes: AGENTS.md is the native instruction format

auto-memory.notes: Initial memory plumbing. Memory tool in 0.99.0. Configurable in 0.107.0. Chronicle alias in 0.121.0

context-compaction.notes: Auto-compact via model_auto_compact_token_limit config. Customizable compaction prompt via compact_prompt.

hook-tool-use.notes: Non-streaming, shell-only initially. MCP tool observation added in 0.124.0.; Post: Non-streaming shell-only PostToolUse initially.

hook-prompt-validation.notes: Prompts can be blocked or augmented before execution.

hook-agent-stop.notes: Part of initial experimental hooks engine.

hook-response-tracking.notes: No Notification hook event in Codex CLI.

hook-subagent-lifecycle.notes: SubagentStart and SubagentStop are supported for command hooks.

version_notes.0.133.0: Added SubagentStart and SubagentStop lifecycle hooks.

hook-session-lifecycle.notes: Part of initial experimental hooks engine.

hook-compaction.notes: PreCompact and PostCompact run for manual and automatic compaction.

version_notes.0.131.0: Compact hooks run for local and remote compaction.
